problem_statement: Edit replay.py so normalize_tool_call(tool_call) returns an OpenAI-compatible assistant tool call shape. Preserve the id, set type to function, and nest the tool name and arguments under function. Verify the tests pass.

files.test_replay.py:
from replay import normalize_tool_call


def test_normalize_tool_call_openai_shape():
    payload = normalize_tool_call({'id': 'call_1', 'name': 'write', 'arguments': {'path': 'a.py'}})
    assert payload['id'] == 'call_1'
    assert payload['type'] == 'function'
    assert payload['function']['name'] == 'write'
    assert payload['function']['arguments'] == {'path': 'a.py'}

problem_statement: Edit adapter_config.py so build_direct_config(real_api_base, real_api_key, real_model) chooses Anthropic credentials when the model starts with claude- and OpenAI credentials otherwise. Verify the tests pass.

files.test_adapter_config.py:
from adapter_config import build_direct_config


def test_claude_model_uses_anthropic_keys():
    config = build_direct_config('https://api.example.com/v1', 'key', 'claude-sonnet-4-6')
    assert config['model'] == 'claude-sonnet-4-6'
    assert config['anthropic_api_base'] == 'https://api.example.com/v1'
    assert config['anthropic_api_key'] == 'key'
    assert 'openai_api_base' not in config


def test_openai_model_uses_openai_keys():
    config = build_direct_config('https://api.example.com/v1', 'key', 'gpt-5.4')
    assert config['model'] == 'gpt-5.4'
    assert config['openai_api_base'] == 'https://api.example.com/v1'
    assert config['openai_api_key'] == 'key'
    assert 'anthropic_api_base' not in config
